title: haloragis tetragyna var. micrantha
intro: Haloragis tetragyna var. micrantha, also known as the dwarf watermilfoil or var. micrantha, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the Haloragaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Haloragis tetragyna var. micrantha include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and calm the body. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
